name: Banana Raisin Walnut Muffins WW
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Spray 12 muffin cups with nonstick spray.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, combine flour, milk powder, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and nutmeg; stir until combined and set aside.
4. In a small bowl, combine buttermilk, egg, oil, and butter; stir until blended. Stir in the dry ingredients.
5. Add bananas, raisins, and walnuts; stir until combined (mixture will be lumpy).
6. Fill each muffin cup with an equal amount of batter.
7. Bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Transfer muffins to a wire rack and cool.
